text: I feel displaced and tense. The dim, angular corridors fill me with uncertainty, and I sense both anticipation and apprehension within myself. As I enter a space marked with "R+D" and read words that echo my own confusion and vulnerability, I am reminded that self-examination is both grounding and destabilizing. Surrounded by the unfamiliar, I take solace in my intent to focus and reflect, questioning how I will navigate this environment and my own inner landscape.
